creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Feb 18 06:00:58 2013
New Revision: 312481
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312481

Log:
  - Extend support for 6 months.
  
  PR:		176149
  Submitted by:	Alex Keda <admin@lissyara.su>

Modified:
  head/lang/php52/Makefile

Modified: head/lang/php52/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/php52/Makefile	Mon Feb 18 05:57:13 2013	(r312480)
+++ head/lang/php52/Makefile	Mon Feb 18 06:00:58 2013	(r312481)
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ COMMENT=	PHP Scripting Language
 
 DEPRECATED=		PHP 5.2 series is strongly discouraged for new \
 			installations, migrate now
-EXPIRATION_DATE=	2013-03-01
+EXPIRATION_DATE=	2013-09-01
 
 LATEST_LINK=	${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}
